name: CyberSecPro
description: WhatsApp Bot Management SaaS — link numbers via pairing codes, manage sessions from a cyberpunk dashboard.

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection string — REQUIRED. Get a FREE cluster at mongodb.com/atlas

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing JWT auth tokens.

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email for the auto-created admin account.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the auto-created admin account (min 6 chars).

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Must be false so devDependencies are installed for the React build step.

NPM_CONFIG_LEGACY_PEER_DEPS.description: Use legacy peer deps resolution to avoid install conflicts.
